nodes.name: Webhook - New Client Signed
nodes.notes: Triggered when a new client signs a contract or completes payment. Connect this to your proposal tool (PandaDoc, DocuSign), payment processor (Stripe), or CRM deal-stage change. Expected payload: { clientName, clientEmail, contactName, contactFirstName, packageType, projectName, startDate, accountManagerEmail }

nodes.name: Prepare Onboarding Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes client data from the webhook, calculates key milestone dates, and determines which onboarding steps apply based on the package tier.

parameters.subject: Welcome to the team, {{$json.contactFirstName}}! Here's what happens next.
parameters.html:
Welcome aboard, {{$json.contactFirstName}}!

We're thrilled to have {{$json.clientName}} on board. This email outlines what to expect over the next few days as we get everything set up for you.

Your Onboarding Timeline

Welcome Call {{$json.welcomeCallDate}}
Project Kickoff {{$json.kickoffDate}}
First Check-in {{$json.firstCheckInDate}}
30-Day Review {{$json.thirtyDayReviewDate}}

What We Need From You

  1. Fill out our client intake form (takes about 10 minutes)
  2. Grant access to the tools and systems we'll be working with
  3. Confirm your availability for the welcome call

Your Account Manager

Your primary point of contact is your account manager at {{$json.accountManagerEmail}}. Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Your onboarding ID is {{$json.onboardingId}}. Reference this in any communications for the fastest response.

Looking forward to working together!

The Team

nodes.name: Email - Welcome Message
nodes.notes: Sends the welcome email immediately upon client signup. Customize the template with your branding, links, and process. The reply-to is set to the assigned account manager.

nodes.name: PM Tool - Create Master Task
nodes.notes: Creates the master onboarding task/project in your project management tool. This example uses Asana, but swap it for ClickUp, Monday.com, Notion, Trello, or whatever your team uses.

nodes.name: Generate Onboarding Subtasks
nodes.notes: Generates all onboarding subtasks with calculated due dates. Tasks are adjusted based on the client's package tier -- premium clients get additional steps like strategy sessions, dedicated Slack channels, and custom training.

nodes.name: PM Tool - Create Each Subtask
nodes.notes: Creates each subtask in your PM tool. This node runs once per subtask generated by the previous step.

nodes.name: Calendly - Create Welcome Call Link
nodes.notes: Creates a single-use Calendly scheduling link for the welcome call. If you use a different scheduling tool (Acuity, Cal.com, SavvyCal), swap this API call accordingly.

parameters.subject: Let's schedule your welcome call, {{$json.contactFirstName}}
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.contactFirstName}},

As a next step, let's get your welcome call on the calendar. This is a 30-minute call where we'll:

  • Walk through our working process
  • Answer any initial questions you have
  • Align on priorities for your first two weeks

Schedule Your Welcome Call

If none of the available times work, just reply to this email and we'll find something that does.

Talk soon,
The Team

nodes.name: Email - Schedule Welcome Call
nodes.notes: Sends the scheduling link to the client. This is sent as a separate email from the welcome message to increase the chance it gets acted on -- too many CTAs in one email reduces action rates.

nodes.name: Slack - Notify Team
nodes.notes: Notifies the internal team that a new client has been onboarded and all automated steps have been executed. Change the channel to match your workspace.

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Log Onboarding
nodes.notes: Logs the onboarding event for tracking and reporting. Columns: onboardingId, clientName, contactName, contactEmail, packageType, startDate, accountManager, createdAt.

meta.author: Relay Launch
meta.description: Automates the full client onboarding sequence from contract signing through 30-day review. Sends welcome email, creates project tasks with calculated due dates (adjusted by package tier), generates a scheduling link for the welcome call, notifies the internal team, and logs everything for reporting.
requiredCredentials: Asana API key (or equivalent PM tool)
Calendly API key (or equivalent scheduling tool)
